remember.label: Keep me signed in on this device

bullets.proxy: A dedicated proxy for every identity
bullets.localFirst: Local-first — your data never leaves this device

brand.heroBody: A local-first anti-detect browser. Every profile gets a unique, consistent fingerprint and its own network identity.

security.title: Robust data security
security.body: Local-first storage with an encrypted vault keeps sensitive data on your device — nothing is synced to a cloud.

fingerprint.title: Undetectable fingerprints
fingerprint.body: Every profile ships a unique, consistent fingerprint: canvas, WebGL, fonts, audio, and hardware.

proxy.title: A proxy for every identity
proxy.body: Bind a dedicated network identity to each profile and rotate with confidence.

automation.title: Time-saving automation
automation.body: Warm cookies, generate profiles in bulk, and orchestrate everything at scale.

license.graceMessage_one: Your subscription has ended — {{count}} day of grace left. Renew to keep access.
license.graceMessage_other: Your subscription has ended — {{count}} days of grace left. Renew to keep access.

pay.noMethods: No payment methods are enabled yet — use a purchase code or contact your administrator.
pay.submitted: Payment submitted — an administrator will review it and activate your plan shortly.

banned.blockedBodyNamed: {{name}}, your account has been blocked by an administrator. Please contact them to restore access — your data is safe.
banned.blockedBody: Your account has been blocked by an administrator. Please contact them to restore access — your data is safe.
banned.endedBodyNamed: {{name}}, your free trial and grace period are over. Renew to unlock your workspace — your profiles and data are safe and waiting.
banned.endedBody: Your free trial and grace period are over. Renew to unlock your workspace — your profiles and data are safe and waiting.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: This is your master account — the owner of the workspace.
register.storedLocally: Stored locally and encrypted on this device

verify.title: Verify your email
verify.devModePrefix: Dev mode — no email is actually sent yet. Your code is

plan.title: You're all set
plan.subtitlePrefix: Your account is ready with a
plan.subtitleSuffix: . Start now, or activate a paid plan.

login.subtitle: Sign in to unlock your workspace.
login.forgotBody: Your master password isn't recoverable on a local install — it never leaves this device. If it's lost, the workspace has to be reset from Settings.

invite.title: Redeem your invite
invite.subtitle: Enter the code you were given and set a password for your account.

member.title: Team member sign in
member.subtitle: Use the email/name and password set when you redeemed your invite.

super.title: Super Admin
super.setupSubtitlePrefix: First-run setup. Create the Super Admin credential for
super.setupSubtitleSuffix: — it's stored hashed on this device and is the only way in, so keep it safe.
super.loginSubtitle: Source-owner access. Bypasses registration and unlocks the full workspace.

pick.title: Who's working?
pick.subtitle: Select your member profile to continue.

db.title: Unlock your database
db.subtitle: This workspace's database is encrypted. Enter your workspace password to decrypt and open it.
db.corrupted: If you're certain the password is right, the database file may be damaged. You can recover by reinstalling and restoring a workspace backup (Settings → Workspace Backup & Restore). There is no password reset — the data can only be opened with the correct password.

errors.enterFirstLast: Enter your first and last name.
errors.password8: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.couldNotSendCode: Could not send the verification code.
errors.superSetupRequired: No Super Admin credential is set yet — create one below.
errors.couldNotCreateSuper: Could not create Super Admin credentials.
errors.password6: Password must be at least 6 characters.
errors.couldNotRedeemInvite: Could not redeem that invite code.
errors.invalidPurchaseCode: That purchase code is not valid.
errors.noPaymentMethod: No payment method is available yet.
errors.dbStillLocked: The database is still locked — please try again.
errors.dbMissing: The encrypted database file is missing. Restore from a workspace backup to recover.
errors.dbUnlockFailed: Incorrect password — or the file is corrupted.
